case_title: KEITH MC GEE VS. CORPORATE CREATIONS NETWORK, INC. et al.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-18-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MUST AMEND CLAIM. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF KEITH MCGEE TELEPHONICALLY. DEFENDANT CORPORATE CREATIONS NETWORK, INC. DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
